injuries.comment: Pettersson is still being evaluated and is unlikely to be in the lineup against the Red Wings on Monday (Dec. 8), per Brendan Batchelor of Sportsnet 650 reports.
Head coach Adam Foote said that Hoglander could return for Thursday's (Dec. 11) game against the Sabres, per Brendan Batchelor of Sportsnet 650.
The Red Wings announced on Tuesday (Dec. 2) that Appleton will be out at least a week with a lower-body injury.
